clEntries.5.11.25: v5.11.25: Fixed voltage divisor in driver #137 — readings were off by a factor of 10 on some plug variants., Dashboard fallback rewrite — device tiles now update properly when the primary state channel drops., 17 new fingerprints from community contributions (138 drivers, 5182+ total FPs)., Internal cleanup across several workflow scripts.
clEntries.5.11.24: v5.11.24: Fixed a workflow trigger race condition. Forum scanner now covers 12 topics. Better diagnostics tracking between runs.
clEntries.5.11.23: v5.11.23: Switched post-forum-update to fetchWithRetry (fixes random post failures). RawClusterFallback for non-Tuya-DP devices. Forum deduplication so the same post doesn't get answered twice.
clEntries.5.11.22: v5.11.22: 8 new fingerprints from JohanBendz scan. Device Finder tool. Forum auth now handles 404/401 gracefully.
clEntries.5.11.21: v5.11.21: IR Blaster learning fix, energy divisors, soil moisture fix. (1) IR Blaster ZS06 manual cluster fallback for learning mode. (2) TS011F _TZ3210_xzhnra8x configurable ZCL energy divisors. (3) _TZ3000_dd8wwzcy added. (4) Soil sensor moisture fix in AdaptiveDataParser. (5) TuyaEF00Manager skip auto-convert for divisor:1 DPs.
clEntries.5.11.19: v5.11.19: Soil sensor compound frame guards, curtain motor physical button fix, CI/CD overhaul with auto-publish.
